name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump makes 9/11 victim fund permanent
body:
This morning, President Donald J. Trump signed into law a permanent authorization of the 9/11 Victim Compensation Fund. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0fb125724&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 29, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump makes 9/11 victim fund permanent**

**This morning,** President Donald J. Trump signed into law a permanent authorization of the 9/11 Victim Compensation Fund, which provides financial support for families who lost their loved ones as a result of the September 11 attacks.

**Watch** : [President Trump on what America showed the world on 9/11](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0590800de&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Today,** we come together as one nation to support our September 11th heroes, to care for their families, and to renew our eternal vow: Never, Ever Forget,” the President said. “Our nation owes each of you a profound debt that no words or deeds will ever repay.”

**But there is something** we can do. “We can and we will keep our nation’s promise to you.”

**More than****100** **Americans** who were personally affected by the devastation of the September 11 attacks joined President Trump at today’s Rose Garden signing ceremony. These individuals included first responders, survivors, and family members of victims.

**Within minutes of the attacks** , many courageous men and women rushed into lower Manhattan, the Pentagon, and a debris-strewn field in rural Pennsylvania to rescue the remaining survivors. For days, they fought to save every person they could find trapped in the rubble. For months, they continued the search for others who had fallen.

**All told,** more than 2,000 first responders and survivors have passed away from illnesses directly related to the toxic fallout from those attacks. Even today, thousands more are battling health problems stemming from that day in American history.

**The 9/11 Victim Compensation Fund** will now provide them with permanent support.

**“To every 9/11 hero,** you poured out your heart, your sweat, your soul, and everything you had for your country,” President Trump said.

**“You went back** day after day and night after night to save lives and return the fallen to their families, to rebuild and recover, and to show the entire world that nothing will ever break America’s spirit.”

[President Trump: “The love and loyalty of our 9/11 responders knew no bounds.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b49c536c65&e=3ee4985eea)

**Read** : [The President’s full remarks on the 9/11 victim fund](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2110ce9331&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **By the numbers: Fighting for cities like Baltimore**

**Over the weekend,** President Trump shined a spotlight on one of America’s hardest-hit cities. For years, corruption and poor leadership have cost residents of Baltimore their livelihoods and—in far too many cases—their lives.

**Baltimoreans have witnessed** a rise in both violent crimes rates and poverty in recent years. In a city with largely one-party rule, Democrat politicians have enriched themselves and their families while failing their constituents for decades on end.

**President Trump** wants cities like Baltimore across America to thrive. The only way to get there is by laying out all the facts—including those the Beltway media would rather ignore. Here’s the real story out of Baltimore that they aren’t talking about:
* **Gun violence is surging** , with more than [150 murders so far this year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75ad787f1c&e=3ee4985eea).

* **Baltimore’s crime rate** was the [highest recorded of all major U.S. cities](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4b455d5b5&e=3ee4985eea) in 2018.

* **In 2017 alone,** there were [12,430 cases of _known_ violent crime](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a46d7ecd06&e=3ee4985eea), including 382 rapes reported, 5,879 robberies, and 5,827 cases of aggravated assault.

* **Sen. Bernie Sanders** likened the city to a [“Third World country”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01e03e7e81&e=3ee4985eea) in 2015.

* **Baltimore’s poverty rate** of [22 percent](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24ce484bf7&e=3ee4985eea) is nearly double the national level.

* **Scandal-plagued leaders** have lined their wallets while neglecting their community. Former Baltimore Mayor Catherine Pugh [resigned earlier this year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02dcd06b18&e=3ee4985eea) after she was caught using her position to enrich herself.

“[Trump is right – Baltimore mistreated by elected Dems, residents deserve better](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50693d160e&e=3ee4985eea)”
---
|
---
|

President Trump wants cities like Baltimore across America to thrive. The only way to get there is by laying out all the facts—including those the Beltway media would rather ignore. Here’s the real story out of Baltimore that they aren’t talking about: Gun violence is surging , with more than . Baltimore’s crime rate was the in 2018. In 2017 alone, there were , including 382 rapes reported, 5,879 robberies, and 5,827 cases of aggravated assault. Sen. Bernie Sanders likened the city to a in 2015. Baltimore’s poverty rate of is nearly double the national level. Scandal-plagued leaders have lined their wallets while neglecting their community. Former Baltimore Mayor Catherine Pugh after she was caught using her position to enrich herself. “” | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian | President Donald J. Trump is applauded by 9/11 first responders and families as he displays his signature on H.R. 1327, an act to permanently authorize the September 11 Victim Compensation Fund | July 29, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: To hell with the status quo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
I'm headed to Detroit right now to represent your voice in the second Democratic debate.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21108/1630b3eb/512b76ef/5f5556cb/24604954/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_julyeom?refcode=690_org_em_fr")
Friend --
It's been a long day of debate prep, but I'm heading to Detroit ready to represent progressive voices like yours in the second Democratic debate.
Because the bottom line is this: when people like you don't speak up and fight back, the status quo and big money win. Guaranteed.
I'm ready to speak up for every voice that's sick and tired of being told we can't win true progressive victories for America. We did it in New York City when people said we couldn't, and we can do it again nationwide if we don't give up this fight.
**[Contribute $1 today to help reach our July financial goal before the month ends. We need 1,800 more donors to stay on track.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21108/1630b3eb/512b76ef/5f5556cb/24604954/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_julyeom?refcode=690_org_em_fr")**
The people who represent the status quo and big money are trying to silence YOUR voice. They don't want fundamental change and they don't want our voices to be heard. If we don't fight back, the status quo and big money will win. Let's send a message that we will not be silenced.
Let's do this,
Bill

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21108/1630b3eb/512b76ef/5f5556cb/24604954/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5MCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_julyeom?refcode=690_org_em_fr")
---

subject: Rep. Susan Wild... Anti-American?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u5VxYwp7mpyW3L8RgqPKqhz4j8fhx1T8PytV4XmfVyea64jsxTphWRjLC6jmGSIn82_OnOXq-axDTblZvbTJSEO82qMKnAtpFqbZ1IganGAksVuX6lkVa9-POZbN00eDk0xyWwokJ7qaj0po54s-8ocNDAaMVpemMLtd7Mmiloo=&c=qdnjtz0LENx-LOym4GvvoLngg-EO4x5BAabWnj7Xt4xUTSMwEttwMw==&ch=LgNqIv7PuPY17ZDqfv54gTMqpSNaf-QYlCcm5_fCf7gA8QM58nj2Iw==)
---
| Dear Patriot,
Have you seen this?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u5VxYwp7mpyW3L8RgqPKqhz4j8fhx1T8PytV4XmfVyea64jsxTphWRjLC6jmGSIn82_OnOXq-axDTblZvbTJSEO82qMKnAtpFqbZ1IganGAksVuX6lkVa9-POZbN00eDk0xyWwokJ7qaj0po54s-8ocNDAaMVpemMLtd7Mmiloo=&c=qdnjtz0LENx-LOym4GvvoLngg-EO4x5BAabWnj7Xt4xUTSMwEttwMw==&ch=LgNqIv7PuPY17ZDqfv54gTMqpSNaf-QYlCcm5_fCf7gA8QM58nj2Iw==)
---
| Last week, Susan Wild was scheduled to be a featured speaker at the Muslim Caucus Education Collective forum along with radical and anti-American Congresswomen Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib.
In the wake of massive amounts of negative press against "The Squad", which is comprised of Congresswomen Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY), Ayanna Pressley (D-MA), Rashida Tlaib (D-MI), and Ilhan Omar (D-MN.), Wild removed herself from the speaker list.
While other excuses were made, the truth is clear: Susan Wild would rather stand with "The Squad" and other America-hating, socialists, instead of with us.
But Susan Wild cannot fool us, and we will remind her of that in November 2020.
Rep. Wild knows all too well that we are entering a tumultuous election year and she is concerned about keeping her seat in a district that is already enraged with her socialist voting record.
While Susan Wild may not be as outspoken as the "Squad", she stands with them every step of the way.
From the Green New Deal to Medicare for All to banning "assault" weapons; Susan Wild supports nearly all of their efforts which would dismantle the fundamental principles our country was founded upon. This doesn't sit well with patriots like you and me.
Susan Wild has made it clear she stands with this new radical freshman class of Congresswomen and with the idea of creating a socialist regime in which our individual freedoms are stripped in favor of big government.
Most importantly, she does NOT stand with America, American Citizens, or the good people of the Lehigh Valley.
Let's remind Susan Wild that there is only one side to be on and that is the side of the American people.
---
| For Freedom,
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u5VxYwp7mpyW3L8RgqPKqhz4j8fhx1T8PytV4XmfVyea64jsxTphWRjLC6jmGSIn82_OnOXq-axDTblZvbTJSEO82qMKnAtpFqbZ1IganGAksVuX6lkVa9-POZbN00eDk0xyWwokJ7qaj0po54s-8ocNDAaMVpemMLtd7Mmiloo=&c=qdnjtz0LENx-LOym4GvvoLngg-EO4x5BAabWnj7Xt4xUTSMwEttwMw==&ch=LgNqIv7PuPY17ZDqfv54gTMqpSNaf-QYlCcm5_fCf7gA8QM58nj2Iw==)
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Democrats vs. America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s time to stop the lying left. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=59368f9b8e0728de92dd098ce5a711a4b0e4e91e091a2f4bc235a9a5beca8e4a559a64f7884d95aa20469a2a064f0565e768e3f2723a8b79)
---

Friend,

The Democrats have become the party that:
* Hates the American Flag and praises Antifa
* Prioritizes illegal immigrants, at the expense of American people
* Hates Israel and promotes terrorism
* Chooses BIG GOVERNMENT socialism over American prosperity
* And would rather see America Fail, than my father succeed

Their dangerous agenda would be a DISASTER for America if they were ever given the power to implement it. **It 's up to YOU to make sure that doesn't happen.**

We can't sit by and let our country be overrun by big-government Socialists like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Joe Biden or members of the America-last caucus like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar.

That's why we need _FOUR MORE YEARS_ of President Trump!

Our July fundraising deadline is 1 day away, and we're still $643,856 short of our $2,000,000 goal. That's why we've been authorized to **TRIPLE-MATCH** all donations made today.
---

It 's up to YOU to make sure that doesn't happen. We can't sit by and let our country be overrun by big-government Socialists like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Joe Biden or members of the America-last caucus like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar. body:
Hi, I wanted to reach out to introduce myself. My name is Jonathan Skule and I'm an intern for the Walz for Governor campaign. With so much on the line next year, I was eager to spend my time making a difference this Summer, and I knew I'd have that opportunity working for Governor Walz. When President Trump claimed last week that his fear-mongering would help him "win" Minnesota in 2020, Governor Walz reminded him that Minnesotans soundly rejected his divisive message in 2018 in favor of One Minnesota -- the idea that we are stronger when we are united. **I 'm proud to be a part of this team as we carry that positive message forward and do our part to make sure that we reject Trump's fear and division once again next year. **I believe strongly in the work we're doing, which is why I asked Berrett if I could email you directly ahead of our July end-of-month deadline tomorrow: [**Will you make a contribution $5 or more to help us hit our $10,000 budget target so we can keep it up and make sure Minnesota stays blue next year?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mWxfddldQJvfUjkMHRSoE4P4-Q2z1mgdr5oQcsIOJbk=/urUNNVrigOiR7xGFrwiI3XAOwPK7Mn3um1ArpXG39M0=?refcode=body-p&amount=25) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/mWxfddldQJvfUjkMHRSoE4P4-Q2z1mgdr5oQcsIOJbk=/urUNNVrigOiR7xGFrwiI3XAOwPK7Mn3um1ArpXG39M0=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/mWxfddldQJvfUjkMHRSoE4P4-Q2z1mgdr5oQcsIOJbk=/urUNNVrigOiR7xGFrwiI3XAOwPK7Mn3um1ArpXG39M0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/mWxfddldQJvfUjkMHRSoE4P4-Q2z1mgdr5oQcsIOJbk=/urUNNVrigOiR7xGFrwiI3XAOwPK7Mn3um1ArpXG39M0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/mWxfddldQJvfUjkMHRSoE4P4-Q2z1mgdr5oQcsIOJbk=/urUNNVrigOiR7xGFrwiI3XAOwPK7Mn3um1ArpXG39M0=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-d)**** ****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/mWxfddldQJvfUjkMHRSoE4P4-Q2z1mgdr5oQcsIOJbk=/urUNNVrigOiR7xGFrwiI3XAOwPK7Mn3um1ArpXG39M0=?refcode=_other-d)**** We could really use your help. But if we're going to stand up to Cotton's network of corporate PACs, Dark Money groups, and Mitch McConnell connections, we have to hit our fundraising goals every single month. We still have $10,200 to go with just days left.

Josh

| Dear Friend,
Last week, Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio Cortez held a not so well kept "secret" meeting to put aside their differences and work towards a common goal--implementing their socialist agenda.
They will tell you it's good for the country, but here is what their secret plan will mean:

* Eliminating employer-based health insurance and replacing it with socialized medicine leading to longer waits and less choice;

* Higher energy costs and limiting even your ability to enjoy a steak or hamburger;

* More taxes for you to pay.

There is no secret about my campaign or why I am running - to stop their socialist agenda. But I need your help. clean_body: Last week, Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio Cortez held a not so well kept “secret” meeting to put aside their differences and work towards a common goal—implementing their socialist agenda. | | | | | | == | Dear Friend, Last week, Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio Cortez held a not so well kept "secret" meeting to put aside their differences and work towards a common goal--implementing their socialist agenda. They will tell you it's good for the country, but here is what their secret plan will mean: Eliminating employer-based health insurance and replacing it with socialized medicine leading to longer waits and less choice; Higher energy costs and limiting even your ability to enjoy a steak or hamburger; * More taxes for you to pay. There is no secret about my campaign or why I am running - to stop their socialist agenda. But I need your help. name: Jason Yates
subject: Did you get my last email?
body:
| | Peter, I’m following up on the email I sent you last week. I’d really like you to participate with us on Voter Registration Sunday. The fourth Sunday of September, the 22nd, is deemed Voter Registration Sunday, a day in which churches across the nation engage civically by encouraging their congregations to register to vote by holding a voter registration drive. We’d like you and your church to be a part of this day. We’ve made it super easy for churchgoers to activate their church by creating a comprehensive toolkit with a step-by-step guide and promotional tools and resources. You can use the resources and execute the event in a way that works best for your church. Get your resources at [www.voterregistrationsunday.org](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNHwpRafOpxA8QS5mpuzuSwv_Xbwp5lCwFJMeWDvEfP6125oNvQhMmAKATb52JkxzJrZrzK5_oTjklbr6ItCaLPMBL_rwlBlXNwB03M3WWItVQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=1). Yes, the 2020 elections are over 16 months away, but there are over 80,000 elections happening across the country this year. And there are over 100,000 elections happening throughout 2020. Let’s work together to create an annual rhythm of registering Christian voters for every election! Let’s start now when the noise of 2020 is not at its peak. We can all make a tremendous difference if we reach Christians within our own spheres of influence - starting at church! Can I count on you? [Sign up here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNHwpRafOpxA8QS5mpuzuSwv_Xbwp5lCwFJMeWDvEfP6125oNvQhMmAKATb52JkxzJrZrzK5_oTjklbr6ItCaLPMBL_rwlBlXNwB03M3WWItVQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=2) to receive everything you need. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNHwpRafOpxA8QS5mpuzuSwv_Xbwp5lCwFJMeWDvEfP6125oNvQhMmAKATb52JkxzJrZrzK5_oTjklbr6ItCaLPMBL_rwlBlXNwB03M3WWItVQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=4)
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190730com01&n=8)

Today's debate day!

It's another chance for the candidates to pitch their visions for the future of our country.

So, Elizabeth will be making the case for big, structural change.

She'll talk about making our government and our economy work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. Her message for this debate is going to be the same message she's already brought to 24 states and Puerto Rico -- that it's time to level the playing field for working families.

**And this kind of change is only possible with a grassroots movement. We can keep investing in growing our person-to-person campaign -- as long as we keep hitting our fundraising targets. But we're still behind on July's goal, and we only have until midnight tomorrow to catch up.**

[**Will you chip in for the first time before tonight 's debate to help make sure our grassroots movement is stronger than ever? clean_body: You're already a part of this movement, and we're so grateful to be in this fight by your side. After tonight, and in the weeks and months to come, we need to be ready for more people to say this... | | | "" Today's debate day! It's another chance for the candidates to pitch their visions for the future of our country. So, Elizabeth will be making the case for big, structural change. She'll talk about making our government and our economy work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. Her message for this debate is going to be the same message she's already brought to 24 states and Puerto Rico -- that it's time to level the playing field for working families. And this kind of change is only possible with a grassroots movement. We can keep investing in growing our person-to-person campaign -- as long as we keep hitting our fundraising targets. But we're still behind on July's goal, and we only have until midnight tomorrow to catch up. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" All across the country, we've seen people respond and relate to Elizabeth's story. A lot of families know what it's like to be on the ragged edge of the middle class or to struggle to find quality child care. Face to face, story by story, plan after plan, we'll keep growing as a team. You 're already a part of this movement, and we're so grateful to be in this fight by your side. After tonight, and in the weeks and months to come, we need to be ready for more people to say this fight is their fight, too. But it takes real resources to reach as many people as we need to reach, and that means we can't fall short of July's fundraising goal. The deadline to reach it is midnight tomorrow night. "" Thanks again for all you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: What I see in John:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
As new as this process is for me, there's one thing that has never been a surprise--John's consistent ability to connect with voters on the ground. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a4509d/196586918/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Tonight, my husband John will stand on the Democratic debate stage alongside nine other candidates for President of the United States.

This has been an incredible journey so far--even writing that last sentence felt surreal!

**But as new as this process is for me, there 's one thing that has never been a surprise: John's consistent ability to connect with voters on the ground.**

When I see him talking to folks across this country, it's clear that they see what I have always seen in him: a smart, passionate, pragmatic and experienced progressive capable of bringing real change to our communities.

And on the debate stage tonight, John will have the opportunity to make connections with millions of voters across the country.

If I know John, I know that he will win over voters each and every time people get to hear his message.

**But he 'll only have a few minutes to speak on stage, and two short chances to speak to the American people is just not enough--we need John in _every_ debate. And that means reaching 130,000 individual donors in the next few weeks.**

[**_Can you chip in today to help John reach the next debate?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190730_RH_20190730-fr-RH-tonightsdebate-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190730_RH_20190730-fr-RH-tonightsdebate-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for your continued support.

Best,
Robin

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45098/196586918/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45099/196586918/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45096/196586918/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45097/196586918/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45094/196586918/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45095/196586918/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771733/691c9bd/6ee653b9/11a45098/196586918/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-073019_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

If we don't reach our goal, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. David

name: Tim Kaine
subject: The path to retaking the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The path to taking back the Senate runs straight through Virginia. That's the honest truth. If my friend Mark Warner loses his re-election campaign next year, we may not be able to retake the Senate -
|
---
| | Derek,

The path to taking back the Senate runs straight through Virginia. That's the honest truth.

If my friend Mark Warner loses his re-election campaign next year, we may not be able to retake the Senate -- and we'll lose our best chance to **pass commonsense legislation** that'll protect our health care, reduce gun violence, defend our elections, and create good jobs.

**I 'm asking you to donate right now to Mark's re-election campaign so we can take back the Senate and deliver tangible results for Virginia families.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1dd/53d9897e/51742751/1c8e7edd/2353481773/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd__158__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1dd/53d9897e/51742751/1c8e7ed8/2353481773/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom?refcode=20190730nd__158__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** When I was up for re-election, Mark stepped up to help me out. Now I'm ready to do the same for him. Before the end of the month, I want to reach 1,000 new donors to help his campaign invest in the tools and staff they need to win next year. **If we can reach that goal, we 'll be well on our way to defending Mark's seat and retaking the Senate. [Will you help?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1dd/53d9897e/51742751/1c8e7ec7/2353481773/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom?refcode=20190730nd__158__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

If January 2021 arrives and Senate Democrats are in the majority, we'll have a chance to:
* Stop GOP attempts to sabotage health care and protect Virginians with pre-existing conditions
* Take meaningful action to reduce sea level rise and address other climate emergencies
* Pass commonsense reforms to reduce and prevent gun violence
* Secure our elections from foreign interference (including by passing Mark's Foreign Influence Reporting in Elections Act)
* Appoint qualified judges who will protect our constitutional rights

All of this is possible, but only if we flip the Senate.

These days, the Senate is mired in gridlock, and dozens of bills that could have real, tangible results for Virginians are often either voted down by Senate Republicans or are never even put on the Senate floor for a vote!

**This must change.**

[**Can you chip in -- whatever you can -- to Mark's campaign and help retake the Senate? It's time to pass more legislation that'll help folks across the Commonwealth.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1dd/53d9897e/51742751/1c8e7ec6/2353481773/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom?refcode=20190730nd__158__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

-- Tim Kaine ** ** ** ** | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1dd/53d9897e/51742751/1c8e7ec5/2353481773/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julyeom?refcode=20190730nd__158__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

Just a
quick note -- according to our fundraising team, we’re getting closer and
closer to reaching our pre-debate goal of raising $500,000 online.

We need to keep pushing, though, if
we’re going to reach our target by tomorrow night. So I’m asking again:
can you add a donation to our campaign today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

We push hard to raise millions of dollars each quarter so we can scale up
our operations across the country and build a winning team.

You might not have guessed it, but a large portion of the funds we raise
come directly from grassroots supporters clicking on the links in emails
just like the one you’re reading right now. And the average online
donation to our campaign this month? Just $23.14.

That means for each fundraising goal we set, we’re counting on a whole lot
of people across the country donating in small amounts. That’s what makes
our campaign possible.

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: DEMO MEMO: Medicare & Medicaid's 54th Anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/demo%20memo.jpg]

DEMO MEMO:

Today Medicare & Medicaid celebrate their 54th anniversary as Lyndon B. Johnson signed the bill into law on this day. Democrats believe that health care is a right for all, and no one should be denied care because they don't make enough money.

Democrats have expanded healthcare coverage through our healthcare law, and now hundreds of thousands of West Virginians have good quality coverage. The expansion of our healthcare law keeps protections in place for nearly 800,000 West Virginians with pre-existing conditions who could have otherwise been denied coverage. Seniors are seeing lower out-of-pocket and prescription drug costs. Below are just a few of the ways West Virginians are able to afford and access health care through Medicare/Medicaid.

*
29%
of
West
Virginians
depend
on
Medicaid
for
health
care,
making
us
the
state
with
the
highest
percentage
of
residents
depending
on
Medicaid.

*
Nearly
50,000
West
Virginians
receive
critical
treatments
for
substance
abuse
disorder
under
Medicaid.

*
The
Medicaid
expansion
provides
17
million
people
nationwide
with
healthcare
coverage
*
With
Medicare,
Seniors
can
receive
treatment
with
lower
out-of-pocket
and
prescription
drug
costs
*
That
includes
331,600
seniors
and
90,300
disabled
beneficiaries
in
West
Virginia
*
At
least
15,000
Veterans
in
West
Virginia
are
enrolled
in
Medicaid

clean_body: [] DEMO MEMO: Today Medicare & Medicaid celebrate their 54th anniversary as Lyndon B. Johnson signed the bill into law on this day. Democrats believe that health care is a right for all, and no one should be denied care because they don't make enough money. Democrats have expanded healthcare coverage through our healthcare law, and now hundreds of thousands of West Virginians have good quality coverage. The expansion of our healthcare law keeps protections in place for nearly 800,000 West Virginians with pre-existing conditions who could have otherwise been denied coverage. Seniors are seeing lower out-of-pocket and prescription drug costs. Below are just a few of the ways West Virginians are able to afford and access health care through Medicare/Medicaid. 29% of West Virginians depend on Medicaid for health care, making us the state with the highest percentage of residents depending on Medicaid. Nearly 50,000 West Virginians receive critical treatments for substance abuse disorder under Medicaid. The Medicaid expansion provides 17 million people nationwide with healthcare coverage With Medicare, Seniors can receive treatment with lower out-of-pocket and prescription drug costs That includes 331,600 seniors and 90,300 disabled beneficiaries in West Virginia At least 15,000 Veterans in West Virginia are enrolled in Medicaid Also today, Republicans have fought against Medicare and Medicaid for 54 years. They continue to obstruct efforts to expand coverage and access to affordable care. name: Cory Booker
subject: We're falling short.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I know you're probably getting a lot of emails right now. And I know you can't chip in every time we ask. So I want you to know when your donation can make the biggest impact -- and this is one of those moments. I'm spending a lot of energy getting ready for the debate tomorrow night because I don't get many opportunities to speak to millions of voters on a level playing field with the other candidates. But I don't want to lose sight of the fact that **tomorrow also marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline.** What we raise by the July 31st deadline will go a long way toward deciding how big we can build this campaign in the months ahead. And team, we're $46,328 behind on our $400,000 July goal. [**We can't afford to slow down our momentum -- I 'm asking you to chip in before our deadline to help make sure our campaign has a strong showing for the end-of-month deadline.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190730-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190730_CB_20190730-fr-CB-EOM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The minute I step off the stage tomorrow night, the work begins to make our case and reach new voters. Thanks to this team, we've already secured a spot in the fall debates, but we have nearly two months until we'll have that national audience again. This deadline is critical to deciding how to allocate the resources we have over the next couple of months. So we can't afford to come up short. We need to build our team in key early states to show everyone what we already know to be true: Our unapologetically bold message is resonating with more people every day. We have a shot at winning this if people like you keep stepping up at moments like this. But we've already started to slip behind our fundraising goal for the month. [**Make a donation before tomorrow night 's fundraising deadline and keep our grassroots campaign on track.**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190730-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190730_CB_20190730-fr-CB-EOM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We've got this,
Cory

---

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: TN Democrats Stand For Rural Health Care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
| | Dear Peter, Tennessee Democrats believe that every Tennessean, no matter who you are, what you look like, or where you live, should have the opportunity for a better life for you and your family. Large metropolitan areas, suburbs, small towns, and rural communities are ALL important and Democrats work hard to solve issues facing every Tennessee, everywhere, because all Tennessee families deserve real, thoughtful solutions to issues that affect or threaten their way of life. In August, we will focus on rural communities:
* Rural Tennessee communities are losing ground in our economy. Tennessee Democratic Party values provide a blueprint for restoring prosperity to small towns and rural communities.
* Rural Tennesseans believe their way of life is worth fighting for. Tennessee Democratic Party values say that we must invest in our local businesses and bring technology to rural areas so we can be connected to the economy, No one should have to leave their hometown in search of a good job with decent pay,
* Rural Tennessee communities are being divided by race-based strategies of division. Tennessee Democratic Party values understand that the rural way of life means that people look out for each other, whether we're white, black or brown, tenth generation or newcomer.

One of the greatest threats to the rural way of life is undoubtedly hospital closures, a lack of health care access, and the opioid crisis, all spurred on by Republicans' refusal to expand Medicaid. Rural Tennessee is being negatively affected by this at an unprecedented rate. The bottom line is, no family can thrive and no community can prosper without access to health insurance or emergency medical services. **The TNDP Stand for Rural Health Care** Throughout the month of August, we will bring the [TNDP Stand For Rural Healthcare Tour](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/B7nypIjHt9H4puk-RHEOL34VlMDnsZZOVdqGy6G_wm4=) to visit communities across the state that have been affected by Tennessee's crisis of rural hospital closures. We will connect with the families who are affected, local elected officials who are struggling to help their communities, and business leaders and health care professionals who feel a very real economic impact. At each visit, we will:
* Listen to the stories of those who have fallen victim to the rural hospital closure epidemic
* Share our values and what we believe, that no rural community should be a disadvantage and no one should have to drive 50 miles to get to a hospital if a loved one has a heart attack or a traumatic brain injury.
* Join forces with union leaders and organizers in small and mid-sized towns to amplify our shared economic message that rural Tennesseans have a right to our roots and no one should have to leave their hometown in search of a good job with decent pay.

To find out more about the tour or to get more involved as a storyteller, speaker, volunteer, or organizer during one of the stops, let us know by [filling out this form](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/HLCEXuOMObDWsUdx_6nUshA4e4SWF0t6HWsVNJ05gPY=) or email Trevon Sylvester at [trevon@tndp.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/9X-XPK89_uddkmyKCEfrn1-8f72wkgdojbMC_FrZulc=). More info at [tndp.org/standforruralhealthcare/](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/B7nypIjHt9H4puk-RHEOL34VlMDnsZZOVdqGy6G_wm4=) and check our [Facebook events page](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/8Ko5g8v0x0yHBFALhGvS763YiP_mlxNtaz9H3yQ4wiA=) periodically for details on all the tour stops. #StandForRuralTN,
Mary \--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party **HELP US AMPLIFY OUR MESSAGE** We can always use the help of dedicated Democrats like you to help us amplify our message. It's easy, just click on the links below and amplify us! Tennessee Democratic Party [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/f__KXdZoJqj2lUyMurlS_qssrz4NXJdD96pGc29lOrY=) | [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/jhA4DVdN5A6VY0ZVNO5RAxgPuWQ3a91My4ytL7lQs_w=) | [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/kreHupf8SiWIbfM-6T3MwSTpWwx2wQ4ycNGkXlCufCc=) | Subscribe to [LEAD 2020 Podcast](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/Yv_JMrD5lxcIzjYyVwzfuKKKhXuz6jvpVXEBaHbjqYU=) Chair Mary Mancini [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/eenPZgjFF5Vl7sI0472vPqQKSJe4nTciOSal9BO3u2Y=) | [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/xyp284pmdwdsWkyYNjiFFxTK6YMfiEQsPoOvGjwirS4=) | [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/oH9oQlOuTbTX4TLzxeMhns-orAg7nGOAoOo_KRXs3BE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tt2zi3X2j0CXv7QDtqK5yM5g5KrdkdC2-muPGipbscw=/e2Z6hrR1LXIHXBNU3zqM_ph_WBs6DSeYOuoCf1DL5vc=)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I need to know you believe in what we're fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team,

I'll be frank: we need to start playing offense by addressing our biggest challenges -- the high cost of health care, the lack of investment in quality foods, the outsourcing of good-paying jobs, the failure of our leaders to ensure equal opportunities for all Americans -- the list goes on and on.

[**Getting a word in on the crowded debate stage tonight won 't be easy. It is imperative that I am prepared to capitalize on every opportunity. Will you contribute now so I can make my final debate prep push?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Getting+a+word+in+on+the+crowded+debate+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_1_1_T2")

The only way to put our country back on track is to elect a president who is willing to roll up their sleeves and do the hard work ahead -- I'll do that. But first, we have to clear the path by getting through these Democratic debates and making our vision for America is heard.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: A lot of eyes are going to be on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
In just a few hours, we’ll head inside the historic Fox Theatre in Detroit to begin the second Democratic debate of 2020. I’m really excited at this point. It’s always a challenge to talk in 30-second snippets about issues that deserve a lot more time.
#
In just a few hours, we’ll head inside the historic Fox Theatre in Detroit to begin the second Democratic debate of 2020.
[Before we get there, I wanted to ask once again for your support. Can you chip in $3 to help us demonstrate momentum heading into the debate? It’ll be great to see how many grassroots commitments we can get before the debate begins.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21097?refcode=ema20190730-45882&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=45882%2E444211%2EBsbHmc)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21097?refcode=ema20190730-45882&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=45882%2E444211%2EBsbHmc)**
I’m really excited at this point. It can be a challenge to talk in 30-second snippets about issues that deserve a lot more time. But tonight is a big opportunity to show what our campaign is all about and why we’re different.
A lot of eyes are going to be on us, from the viewers in homes across the country to the reporters wondering how our campaign will fare in the months to come.
I believe in this country. But I believe in this country because I believe in you. All of you. When I go out on stage tonight, I carry your faith in me — and in the campaign we’re building together — with me.
I want you to know that your support and belief in this campaign really means so much to me. You’ve given me the hope and the inspiration to keep pushing every day, even during the toughest moments of the campaign.
From the beginning, I’ve said that it will not be one person alone who will win this primary and defeat Donald Trump. It will be all of us. Our only chance to win, our only chance to stop Trump, our only chance to create real and lasting change as we overcome every challenge before us, lies in building a grassroots movement the likes of which we haven’t seen in our lifetimes. It’ll take millions of us stepping up to volunteer, contribute, and share our vision. Without PACs, without corporations, without special interests, and without lobbyists. All with people. That’s why I’m emailing you today.
[Can you be one of the ones to step up and contribute before the debate officially begins? What you bring to the table is vital to the future of our campaign, and therefore the future of this country.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21097?refcode=ema20190730-45882&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=45882%2E444211%2EBsbHmc)
Before big moments like tonight, I try to center myself by thinking back to why we are all doing this in the first place. I think about Ulysses, Molly, and Henry. I think about what we’re going to tell them about what we did in the face of the cruelty of kids in cages, the open racism of “send them back,” the unchecked tyranny of a lawless president. I want to be able to tell them that, together, we stood up and put an end to all of that, and to all the horrors of this administration.
This debate is an opportunity for our campaign. It could very well be a turning point for our country too. As I head in there, I’m deeply grateful to have you in my corner.
Beto

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: quick read before tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin For Congress
body:
_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8673592/84290243/-391868641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjIyNTc0ZC0wN2IzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9lt34rTX78cgIkoNjXYHLosbeusHEbxmDNA1ML0f99c=&refcode=em_fr_2019.07.30_b1_es_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)**_
---
Friends,

I’m on my way right now to downtown Detroit to attend the Democratic Presidential Debates with activists from across Michigan’s 8th district. But I wanted to make sure all the presidential candidates who are coming in also know where I stand on the race for the White House in 2020 -- and how I think we can win Michigan. I published the following article in the [**Detroit Free Press**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8673593/84290244/-1520761928?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjIyNTc0ZC0wN2IzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9lt34rTX78cgIkoNjXYHLosbeusHEbxmDNA1ML0f99c=) today, check it out below!

_Elissa_

* * *
**She flipped a GOP seat. Here's her advice for Democratic presidential candidates**

The 20 candidates vying for the Democratic presidential nomination have arrived in Detroit. By now, everyone realizes that a Democrat cannot become President without winning our state. That’s good, because I believe that the candidate who can speak to Michigan voters has the best shot at winning nationally. So, we rightly have the candidates’ attention.

But as one of the two Democratic members of Congress who flipped Republican seats this past November, I know how important it is for candidates to speak to the issues affecting our communities here in Michigan. And while I understand the candidates are trying to win a crowded primary, I am increasingly concerned that they are trying to outdo one another in ways that are deeply unhelpful for the general election, rather than tuning in to the issues voters in Michigan need them to hear. We cannot miss the mark in Michigan and other key states in the Midwest. And we must remain laser-focused on the goal: to win.

As far as the Democratic primary goes, I am an undecided voter. In determining how I will eventually cast my vote in the Democratic presidential primary, I will evaluate the candidates based on three criteria: their positions on economic issues, their focus on practical solutions, and their character.

First, on economic issues: the future of work, and thereby the future of the American Dream, is what drives our state, and what my constituents raise with me every day. Between stagnant wages and the cost of everything going up –– particularly health care and college tuition –– people have less money to save and less money to spend.

While the economy is doing well by some measures, Michigan's middle class has been hollowing out, and income disparity is on the rise. And while unemployment may be low, too many jobs aren’t paying enough to make ends meet. That very basic, American idea that a job leads to prosperity, which leads to dignity, has started to falter.

We ignore this trend at our peril. Michiganders want to hear candidates speak directly to pocketbook issues, and those who do stand a better chance at succeeding with voters here.

The path to prosperity and dignity does not require upending the American economy. In mid-Michigan, people are looking for a level playing field, with a clear path for how to get ahead. It’s important to come to terms with the fact that after so many years of being let down by government, many in our state are wary of proposals that call on government to run bigger and bigger sectors of their lives. So a successful candidate will articulate a clear plan to strengthen the middle class through a new future of work, while tackling the out-of-control costs of healthcare, prescription drugs, and tuition. And he or she needs to figure out a no-kidding, once-in-a-generation infrastructure plan that invests in our roads and bridges, but also our in water systems.

Secondly, our primary candidates need to be practical. Whoever wins will have to work with both Democrats and Republicans. Growing up, my father was a Republican and my mother was a Democrat. Michigan has always been a swing state, so we understand that the goal is to have two political parties, debating the issues with empathy and respect.

In the past six months, I have found many opportunities to develop and pass legislation with lawmakers with whom I don’t uniformly agree. A successful Democratic candidate will demonstrate a similar pragmatic approach, and should be able to articulate how they will help people’s lives, even under a divided government.

Lastly, there is the issue of character. This plays a big role in my decision-making, as I imagine it will for many of Michigan’s voters in 2020. I do not have to agree with everything a candidate believes, but I do have to believe that they represent core American values, and they will lead with decency and sincerity. They need to be ready to make tough, unpopular decisions if it’s in the best interest of the country. And just as important, a successful candidate will affirm the best parts of America without insulting people and splitting people apart.

Displaying those qualities on a stage with Democratic peers is the easiest way to demonstrate one’s leadership qualities. Our American experiment deserves an advocate, and the American people respond best to inspiration, not fear-mongering. | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8673594/84290245/-391868641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MDk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjIyNTc0ZC0wN2IzLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9lt34rTX78cgIkoNjXYHLosbeusHEbxmDNA1ML0f99c=&refcode=em_fr_2019.07.30_b1_es_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)**
---

subject: Meeting with Juan
body:

It’s us. The people who send you emails from Kamala’s campaign for
president.

like, five minutes), and want to make sure we have the most up-to-date
numbers possible when we do.

Can you make a contribution to Kamala’s campaign before we pick up the
phone?

We have to call him soon from the conference room (in like, five minutes), and want to make sure we have the most up-to-date numbers possible when we do. Can you make a contribution to Kamala’s campaign before we pick up the phone? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Chip in $5 now [ ]Chip in $25 now [ ]Chip in $50 now [ ]Chip in $100 now [ ]Chip in $250 now [ ]Another Amount As you probably know, a big chunk of our overall fundraising comes from grassroots supporters pitching in on emails like this one (thank you!). As you probably also know (if you’ve been reading these emails) we have a big fundraising deadline tomorrow. We need to raise $500,000 before Kamala takes the debate stage to stay on track. We refresh ActBlue basically all day to find out how close we are to reaching our goal. Right now, we still have a ways to go to reach it: But if all of Kamala’s supporters step up in a big way, we think we can get there. name: Abigail
subject: The importance of our ongoing work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

[_**We are nearly at the end of the month and we have an important fundraising goal for July.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fmVsMud5lW3z6gYs-Ie9NVAeywIMd6zV6gH3ZGbGDas=/w4ZIhtdzyDgHpwnefG7oe_ZF715eqhjqINKEtFveVDs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190730-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250) I'm going to ask you for a contribution, but first I want to tell you why.

In 2018 when I won my race it was a moment of enormous gratitude and a feeling of enormous responsibility. We won that race not just because we knocked hundreds of thousands of doors across Central Virginia, but because we did something our predecessor did not: we listened to the people of the district and built a grassroots campaign.

Our campaign resonated with voters. And when I went to Capitol Hill, I made it my priority to ensure that the people of Virginia's seventh had someone in their corner in the corridors of Congress every single day.

I'm incredibly proud of what we have accomplished: We passed a prescription drug package on the House Floor, I personally introduced a bill that increases transparency in prescription drug pricing, and it has passed out of two committees with bipartisan support. I have also co-sponsored a bill that would allow Medicare Part D to negotiate its drug costs to help lower costs. And I helped introduce and pass a landmark bill that limits special interest money in politics and strengthens transparency.

[_**We were able to achieve these things because we have a Democratic House of Representatives and because you have helped me win. Now, I need your help to achieve our July fundraising goal. Can you make a contribution today? We 're $7,230 from our goal and I'd appreciate your support.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fmVsMud5lW3z6gYs-Ie9NVAeywIMd6zV6gH3ZGbGDas=/w4ZIhtdzyDgHpwnefG7oe_ZF715eqhjqINKEtFveVDs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190730-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

There is more work for us to accomplish and I hope I can count on your support to help achieve it. | | | [CONTRIBUTE >> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fmVsMud5lW3z6gYs-Ie9NVAeywIMd6zV6gH3ZGbGDas=/w4ZIhtdzyDgHpwnefG7oe_ZF715eqhjqINKEtFveVDs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190730-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
Thank you,
-Abigail

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fmVsMud5lW3z6gYs-Ie9NVAeywIMd6zV6gH3ZGbGDas=/E8cMM4Erhlf-jJtAeOBsUb-gLTAEpnXmH3vcQXpDQYg=?refcode=BLU-footer&recurring=true) Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. subject: RE: I won't waste your time:

body:
Nate Silver just named Colorado one of Democrats' two best pickup opportunities in the Senate.
|

| | I know you're getting a lot of emails today, so I promise this will be quick:

[**I'm asking for $19 before the End of Month Deadline in 24 hours so I can fund the next round of ads and outreach for this historic campaign. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ad/232dfd1/9c9a9a2/62a12887/1412486163/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Nate Silver just named Colorado one of Democrats' two best pickup opportunities in the Senate.

That means if we want to flip the Senate, we have to win here.

If we lose my race, we're looking at another two years of obstructionist Mitch McConnell running the Senate. The Supreme Court, health care, tackling climate change, investing in education... it's all on the line.

Frankly, the stakes are extraordinarily high. That's why I keep asking for money -- not because I like it, but because we need it to win. _**And because donors like you really can make the difference!**_

So, I'm asking: Can I count on your support with $19 before my critical End of Month deadline in 24 hours so we can win my race, flip the entire Senate, and oust Mitch McConnell?

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How America Needs to Follow Up On the First Step Act
body:
"Twenty-two years. That’s how long I spent behind bars before the First Step Act was signed into law." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b16b5211c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How America Needs to Follow Up On the First Step Act**

“Twenty-two years. That’s how long I spent behind bars before the First Step Act was signed into law — and, just like that, I had a second chance,” writes Matthew Charles, one of the first inmates to benefit from President Donald J. Trump’s criminal justice reform.

After signing the First Step Act, “the president launched a Second Chance Initiative last month to reduce barriers to employment for formerly incarcerated people just like me. He and business leaders know that helping people get jobs is a win for us and a win for the economy.”

The reality is that “bills like the First Step Act sat stalled in Congress for years, through control of both parties, before Trump stepped in,” Charles says.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cec47a361f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump on Monday signed a bill ensuring that a fund to compensate victims of the Sept. 11, 2001, terror attacks never runs out of money,” Adam Edelman reports for [NBC News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ded57a54fe&e=3ee4985eea). “Addressing the numerous 9/11 first responders in attendance for the signing moments later, Trump said, ‘Over the last two decades, you have endured hardship with amazing grace and incredible grit.’”
---
|
---
| “At the end of the day, the United States, Mexico and Canada have hammered out a new and improved trade agreement critical to the economic infrastructure of North America. In fact, the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement – USMCA, as it’s known – is so important it’s almost unthinkable a Democrat majority in Congress could kill it for no reason other than it was negotiated by the Trump administration,” the [_Albuquerque Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8de6e64172&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “When President Trump was elected, he promised to fight for American workers by putting into place strong, fair trade deals. He has worked hard to deliver on that promise,” Sen. Mike Rounds (R-SD) writes in the [_Argus Leader_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9121f0c00&e=3ee4985eea). USMCA, which will replace the outdated NAFTA, is one such deal. “Supporting farmers, ranchers, manufacturers, small businesses and other industries in every state across the country is not a partisan issue.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump just issued new rules that got little attention from the mainstream media, but stand to bring fresh economic opportunity to America’s rural and disadvantaged communities. It’s another example of ways, big and small, that the president is going to bat for the forgotten heartland and taking the country back from the swampy beltway elitists,” Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) writes in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85f86f1dcb&e=3ee4985eea). “The rules bring much needed reforms to the fraud-stricken ‘EB-5’ investor visa program . . . Rural America will finally start to see the benefits of a nearly 30-year-old program.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4de71a2f0c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7dadc4ef3d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c2e8cb6842)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Zach Graumann, Yang2020
subject: DNC Revokes Andrew’s 4th Qualifying Poll: Andrew Needs You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | | |
---
| Friend -- Just yesterday, Andrew hit 2% in his fourth and what should’ve been his last qualifying poll for the September debates. Less than 24 hours after that poll was released, the DNC has revoked our second poll, saying that Andrew does not qualify to be on the September stage in Houston. This is where you come in: we need you to help us fight back. Our team is working hard, but the political establishment is stacking the deck against us. We have a plan - increase name recognition and polling numbers by getting Andrew’s message in front of as many voters as possible. That means a whole new game: TV ads. clean_body: | | | | | Friend -- Just yesterday, Andrew hit 2% in his fourth and what should’ve been his last qualifying poll for the September debates. Less than 24 hours after that poll was released, the DNC has revoked our second poll, saying that Andrew does not qualify to be on the September stage in Houston. This is where you come in: we need you to help us fight back. Our team is working hard, but the political establishment is stacking the deck against us. We have a plan - increase name recognition and polling numbers by getting Andrew’s message in front of as many voters as possible. That means a whole new game: TV ads. That’s right! We need you to help us take our message to television. Our Humanity First campaign needs you to fight back harder than you ever have before. Give $20, give $50, or give $100. Give what you can to make sure that we can hit our 7-day, $300,000 goal and flood the airwaves in early states with Andrew’s message. We knew this wouldn’t be easy, and truthfully, we knew that it might not always be fair. In fact, we know too well how this game is played. Through being left off of a media outlet’s graphic, through a muted microphone, through a revoked poll - you have been with us every step of the way. You’ve proven that our Yang Gang is unstoppable and that there is nothing we can’t accomplish. Let’s keep proving the experts wrong. All of us on the campaign are looking forward to standing on that stage in September, but it looks like we may have to fight and claw our way there. There’s no one else we’d rather have on our team than you. Let’s do this, Zach | | | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
I need your help, friend. My friend and colleague, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, is up against a big July fundraising deadline that's critical for the success of her campaign.

I need your help because **[I can't afford to lose Debbie in Congress and, frankly, neither can South Florida.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+I+canrsquot+afford+to+lose+Debbie+in+Con&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")**

Chip in $10 now to help Debbie meet her end of July fundraising goal. We need to keep a stronghold in South Florida so we can finally see progressive policy on the environment, immigration and gun violence prevention.

Debbie hit the ground running when she took office in 2018. It's rare to see a freshman member of Congress be so effective so quickly. And the policy she's putting forth is big, bold and it's changing the lives of South Floridians.

That's especially true as she leads the way in Congress on immigration reform. She's drawing much-needed attention to the conditions in the Homestead detention center and holding this Administration accountable for their cruelty. That's the kind of voice we need at the table for us right now.

I'm proud to work alongside Debbie and I'm going to do whatever I can to keep her in this seat. **[Help me do just that by giving $10 now to her end-of-month fundraising goal!](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+do+just+that+by+giving+10+now+to&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split evenly between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Debbie Wasserman Schultz. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

**************[Donate $10 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")******

********[Donate $25 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")******

******[Donate $50 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")******

**********[Donate $100 now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")******

******[Other amount](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-dmp-split?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=7+-+Other+amount&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_1")********
Thanks for stepping up,

Debbie Wasserman Schultz

name: Shailene Woodley
subject: big and little lies about climate change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
We need a climate debate

[](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/climate-debate?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1")
Friend, did you know that last month was the hottest month ever recorded in human history across the globe? Well, July is now on track to break that short-lived record. It's time for the DNC to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and hold a presidential debate on the climate crisis.
Demand the DNC host a climate debate

* * *
Despite the increasingly clear reality that we are in a spiraling climate crisis, the DNC is refusing to hold a presidential debate focused on the candidates' plans to prevent a full-blown catastrophe.

We have a responsibility to every living being on planet earth to not allow the greatest crisis we have ever faced as human beings to be swept under the rug by the media.

While the oil industry and the politicians they fund desperately try to keep feeding us both big and little lies, the truth is that the American people deserve a climate debate.

But in order to make that happen, we all need to fight for it. We know that real transformational power comes from people -- our unity, our commitment, our knowledge -- and from our strength in numbers.

[Add your name here to join me in demanding that the DNC host a debate specifically focused on the climate crisis ->](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/climate-debate?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+to+join+me+in+demandi&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1")

No one will be coming to save us. That's why it's essential for us to organize right now. It is up to us to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and demand a healthy, just, and sustainable planet.

Our Revolution groups around the country are mobilizing at the local level to demand a climate debate because the fate of our shared planet literally depends on it.

[Sign here to stand with Our Revolution in telling the Democratic Party to host a presidential debate focused exclusively on the climate crisis ->](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/climate-debate?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Sign+here+to+stand+with+Our+Revolution+i&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1")

Climate change and environmental justice can no longer be ignored.

Thank you for being a part of the millions of people around the world who are standing up.

In Solidarity,
Shailene Woodley

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a3dc/bed43eb/ad08736d/75fa3e7e/1140183429/VEsC/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+update+your+info&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a3dc/bed43eb/ad08736d/75fa3e79/1140183429/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a3dc/bed43eb/ad08736d/75fa3e78/1140183429/VEsA/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a3dc/bed43eb/ad08736d/75fa3e7b/1140183429/VEsB/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+contributing+to+Our+Revolution+here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_PET_180DO_190729_1_1").

body:
