| | Bumping this note from Will about Francis being away on duty in the Navy Reserves. We still have $8,020 left to raise before midnight tomorrow. **[Will you rush any amount now to help us cross the finish line?](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+rush+any+amount+now+to+help+us+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")

[https://conole.bsd.net/july-grassroots](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+httpsconolebsdnetjulygrassroots&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")**

\----Begin original message----

Here's something you may not know about Francis: He currently serves as a Commander in the Navy Reserves.

He's proud to still serve our country, but it requires him to depart for his Annual Training for 2 weeks.

But, just because he's fulfilling his duty to serve doesn't mean our mission to win can slow down!

[**We told Francis that while he 's away, we'd raise the $12,000 we need to reach our July fundraising goal. Will you help us get there by donating to our Patriot Fund now?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+We+told+Francis+that+while+hersquos+away&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._
**[Donate $10 now!](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Donate+10+now&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")**

**[Donate $25 now!](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Donate+25+now&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")**

**[Donate $50 now!](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+Donate+50+now&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")**

**[Donate $100 now!](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+Donate+100+now&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")**

**[Donate another amount](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=7&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")** Flipping NY-24 from red to blue won't be easy, and it'll take a lot of grassroots resources. That's why it's critical that we reach all of our fundraising goals from here on out.

[**Chip in to our Patriot Fund before midnight on Wednesday to help us raise the $12,000 we still need!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+to+our+Patriot+Fund+before+midni&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_1_2")

Thank you,

Will Van Nuys
Francis' Campaign Manager |

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. body:
It's a big night, so we've got a big goal. Will you help? | | |

subject: NEW via NPR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I asked. My mom, Rosie asked. My brother, Joaquin asked. My wife, Erica asked. Now I'm asking again. That's how absolutely critical this is. [**_NPR just reported tomorrow could be my last time on the debate stage. But I 'm just one poll away from making the next cut. I'm asking for $15 before my End of Month Deadline to reach that final poll and secure my spot on that stage. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec4/3eb3e2fc/5b5ab5dc/744be119/3993870512/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v2&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I won't mince words with you: I am the only candidate who has met the donor requirement -- but still hasn't officially qualified for the next debates. You've never let me down before. Not once. When the press counted me out... When the establishment said I was a longshot... When the far right said a kid from an immigrant family could never represent this country... I'll never forget how you believed in me and had my back. **I know with one final surge of support -- 2,559 gifts before my End of Month Deadline in 24 hours -- I can spread my message and reach the final poll I need to qualify for the next debates. ** I'm counting on your $15 more than you know: | | [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec4/3eb3e2fc/5b5ab5dc/744be118/3993870512/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b1_castro_all_v2&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

Julian

| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec4/3eb3e2fc/5b5ab5dc/744be102/3993870512/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec4/3eb3e2fc/5b5ab5dc/744be101/3993870512/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec4/3eb3e2fc/5b5ab5dc/744be100/3993870512/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec4/3eb3e2fc/5b5ab5dc/744be10f/3993870512/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Team Wilmot
subject: What a week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
We've had a pretty incredible week. Wilmot was on MSNBC three times this past week talking about our campaign, and we've gotten a bunch of other great press coverage.
And thanks to supporters like you, we're on track to crush our fundraising goals for this month -- but first, we need 128 more people to step up and invest in our campaign.
[**Will you be one of them? Contribute $5 before midnight tomorrow to meet our July goal.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190730&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
With all the national attention on our campaign this week, we've put Republican Senator Steve Daines on the defensive.
Daines knows he's vulnerable. Montana elected a Democratic senator last year and we can do it again in 2020 -- but first, we're going to have to take on Daines' corporate special interest backers.
[**We can 't do this without you. Contribute $5 before midnight tomorrow to keep up the momentum and ensure we finish the month strong.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190730&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Team Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190730&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

name: Khizr Khan
subject: RE: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I emailed yesterday.
I had to reach out one more time.

Because I cannot stay silent in the face of what I just witnessed.

First, I endured this President's attacks on my wife, my fallen son, and my faith.

Then, I watched him tell four Congresswomen of color to "go back" to their "crime infested" countries.

Now, his latest racist attacks on beloved Congressman Elijah Cummings are a painful reminder of why our fight is so important.
**I 'd walk barefoot to every state in the country to rob Donald Trump of his power.**
** ** I know the best way to defeat his hatred is to flip his Republican Senate -- and replace them with people of color like Ben Ray. I need a massive wave of support for Ben Ray before his end-of-month deadline in 24 hours. Can I count on your $15? | | **[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e8/599720587/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**
---

**[**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e9/599720587/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=15")**
---

**[**Chip in $30 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1ee/599720587/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=30")**
---

**[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1ef/599720587/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=50")**
---

**[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1ec/599720587/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**
---

I am a proud Muslim.

I am also a proud American.

This President does not believe I can be both.

So let me be very clear about this:

**I love this country -- my son gave his life for this country -- and I 'll fight until my last breath to protect this country from Donald Trump.**

I'm asking for a strong surge of support to defeat Donald Trump's Republican Senate.

[**_Before the end-of-month deadline in 24 hours, will you answer my call with $15 to replace Trump 's Republican Senate with strong, diverse leaders like Ben Ray? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1ec/599720587/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b2_khan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

Respectfully yours,

Khizr Khan

** **
** **
** **
** **
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1ed/599720587/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e2/599720587/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e3/599720587/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e0/599720587/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e1/599720587/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b500/18e32a7f/54068b07/7bcbd1e6/599720587/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.
---

subject: watching tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
Tonight, Democrats will take the stage for their next round of presidential primary debates. But if you’d prefer not to watch (I can’t blame you), **[If you’re fed up with the radical garbage that Democrats will feed us at their presidential primary debate tonight, donate any amount to help me fight for American values and the Sixth District before our July fundraising deadline hits at 11:59pm tomorrow>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=eb2ee3cf7d83413e8ed4c34f96123364&_e=-PR87RWUZ0Vm6mpBCH0ADy849NDSiHgpS9YdtZKdGfhUImUJd0AbVOSLsLblwuJBTaA6WtKEwcQDUGBJvs5zHLwjBRGmN3NYpwuBPOBMac-MYFZKx83Iw9c8o-n6-3R1ovslUH7sWVJOkCm6kQCM0DBm1ubw04rIOwYBeBFH5Gzu5H1l_hbndf9PCASTy2t8vAnNJnCsmbmsDo3LZBsh7C3tHZIZNiv3kKKvQTgPzlJEBEFpAi83eGXXNQ8sJ1oH-ImCFRo9VkSBTnG78Hahd8xOncA0-uZgFPE86XAuEcn8WQyd28bdwsJqJZi6V5IHzwsGf876RTvdcrrqZLCujcdx8HkiJCvU_6TTIyjcBq_Qtg6CAC5kIA5Jb0T358ST9rYtWjxCV4AYMGUUNxu7aWioYm-pSaJCZzS3uy9Lhak%3D)** [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=eb2ee3cf7d83413e8ed4c34f96123364&_e=-PR87RWUZ0Vm6mpBCH0ADy849NDSiHgpS9YdtZKdGfhUImUJd0AbVOSLsLblwuJBTaA6WtKEwcQDUGBJvs5zHLwjBRGmN3NYpwuBPOBMac-MYFZKx83Iw9c8o-n6-3R1ovslUH7sWVJOkCm6kQCM0DBm1ubw04rIOwYBeBFH5Gzu5H1l_hbndf9PCASTy2t8vAnNJnCsmbmsDo3LZBsh7HJmThiQJ_SJY5OpUn4PSM5KYUgkQZMEp0Db1oHFME694aukqbBqmeyXaMQJNMl5v8rC3jjbf7c9Jq29d9ovNcJc7UrodBPvf15Re7v3lw6tP9n--WLm3d0yRwSOHh99cNKfxINGFYBy79Uj88FDh6bBeT9KDrbHPTBzvFRKrWC8vUQaiYGBb7HfH5bHXgmCeJNBli4KCOf-3BjoiFo5WWY%3D) Friend, Tonight, Democrats will take the stage for their next round of presidential primary debates.
But if you’d prefer not to watch (I can’t blame you), here’s the type of rhetoric you’ll be missing:
* Socialism
* Open borders and disdain for our brave ICE agents
* Laughing off the rule of law
* Threats against the Second Amendment
* Promises to impeach our president

[ **Donate to help me fight back against this madness** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=eb2ee3cf7d83413e8ed4c34f96123364&_e=-PR87RWUZ0Vm6mpBCH0ADy849NDSiHgpS9YdtZKdGfhUImUJd0AbVOSLsLblwuJBTaA6WtKEwcQDUGBJvs5zHLwjBRGmN3NYpwuBPOBMac-MYFZKx83Iw9c8o-n6-3R1ovslUH7sWVJOkCm6kQCM0DBm1ubw04rIOwYBeBFH5Gzu5H1l_hbndf9PCASTy2t8vAnNJnCsmbmsDo3LZBsh7Ehy6DxS8nf5NE3NetbuXXsmwgTLrPx1CjcyMDTV3Uy0lH6w5OXE62FSddJ8xZ4J6tTWDSg4TPgoFDsGlJVLMXbTyPhwQUei3TWBIBn7hxCTDpDaxeZfJhJlUk3CWBBQvxOr27WcOYlPrMZLPINmxjZMW2Ju10wGZwbEJGYITJ1HMa5AUfyVTFc51kZRCj1RMfl6uPi6tzeYtSuQtmR9wI4%3D) I know that folks here in the Sixth District are just as appalled by the direction of today’s Democratic Party as I am, and that’s why I’m fighting back against this radical nonsense.

name: Team Hood
subject: A week away
body:
|
---
It's crunch time. The primary election is a week from today, and we can already feel the excitement building around the campaign.
Friend,

It's crunch time. The primary election is a week from today, and we can already feel the excitement building around the campaign. In just a few days, people will go to the ballot boxes and cast the first votes for Jim in this race!

We've been able to create this movement because of your support. You have helped spread our message to every county from Alcorn to Amite, and together we have the state buzzing in a new way.

But things are about to get a lot tougher. The opposition has a larger war chest, and they have money from out-of-state corporations flowing into their deep pockets. They have already been spending massive amounts of dark money to attack Jim's character! We need your help to get ahead of our general election opponent and prepare to counter the attacks before they ramp up. **Will you chip in today to help us mount our defense?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/nA-kUQKvkEJc7F0QerD3BHGIGTktW90z06FyFdbwb8k=/frpgr7QxhrSwK6jTM54FVauXuzQBUEDQ5kepQQc6G2s=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/nA-kUQKvkEJc7F0QerD3BHGIGTktW90z06FyFdbwb8k=/frpgr7QxhrSwK6jTM54FVauXuzQBUEDQ5kepQQc6G2s=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/nA-kUQKvkEJc7F0QerD3BHGIGTktW90z06FyFdbwb8k=/frpgr7QxhrSwK6jTM54FVauXuzQBUEDQ5kepQQc6G2s=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190730nd&amount=25)**

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/nA-kUQKvkEJc7F0QerD3BHGIGTktW90z06FyFdbwb8k=/frpgr7QxhrSwK6jTM54FVauXuzQBUEDQ5kepQQc6G2s=?refcode=20190730nd)**
Jim Hood is, hands down, the best choice for Mississippi's governor. He has a history of standing up for our state in his nearly 16 years as attorney general, and he has never failed to advocate for Mississippi families. His record shows that, as governor, he'll deliver on his promises by expanding access to health care, repairing our roads and bridges, and fully funding our public education system. We have a chance to make this positive vision a reality in November -- and that fight starts now. [**Can we count on your support today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nA-kUQKvkEJc7F0QerD3BHGIGTktW90z06FyFdbwb8k=/frpgr7QxhrSwK6jTM54FVauXuzQBUEDQ5kepQQc6G2s=?refcode=20190730nd&amount=10)

Thank you,

Team Hood

subject: making your voice heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:

&zw nj; Tim has spent his career fighting for our values because he knows what truly makes this country strong is our commitment to freedom, fairness, and opportunity for all.

[**It is crucial that he be prepared to voice his vision on the debate stage -- but he needs your help to make sure his voice is heard. Will you chip in $3 now?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+It+is+crucial+that+he+be+prepared+to+voi&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_2_2_T2")

Andrea

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

> Team,
>

>
> [**Getting a word in on the crowded debate stage tonight won 't be easy. It is imperative that I am prepared to capitalize on every opportunity. Will you contribute now so I can make my final debate prep push?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_2_2_T1&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Getting+a+word+in+on+the+crowded+debate+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190730_2_2_T2")

>

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: We may be too late to fix our climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

We’re running out of time to fix our climate crisis.

The climate crisis is making parts of our world uninhabitable - threatening water sources, preventing cultivation of the land and creating extreme, unsurvivable temperatures. Mass migration and civic instability will be inevitable if we don't act now. The climate deniers have had their day. It's time for leadership.

It’s going to take aggressive action to reverse this climate crisis – but GOP climate deniers, including David Perdue, are standing in the way. Chip in before this month’s deadline to join me in the fight towards a green future and saving the earth:
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate_change?refcode=em073019-a&amount=5&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate_change?refcode=em073019-a&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate_change?refcode=em073019-a&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate_change?refcode=em073019-a]

Real progress will be made through building a movement, not empty promises. We deserve leaders who will invest in clean energy and put America back as an international leader in reversing climate change. Instead, we have an administration who has us on the outside looking in at the Paris Climate Agreement.

If we don’t lead the way on investment in green energy, other countries will. A green new economy would create millions of jobs in the US as we invest in solar and wind energy and construct a new power grid. Working-class Americans would see a drop in their energy bills each month. These opportunities would stimulate our economy, but fossil fuel cheerleaders in Washington are only interested in lining the pockets of the coal and oil industry.

We need leaders in Congress who understand the severity of the climate crisis and will fight to transform our energy system. Chip in to join me in the fight for a new green economy for all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate_change?refcode=em073019-a&noskip=true]

Time is running out for us to solve the climate crisis. I hope you’ll join me in standing up for what’s right for our environment.

Together,
Teresa Tomlinson

body:

| Friend, we have good news _and_ bad news -- so we'll lead with the good: Yesterday we hit the 130,000 donor threshold to guarantee Cory's spot in the fall debates -- and with an average contribution of only $15.11. But, we need your help to keep up the momentum. We're $34,813 away from hitting our July goal -- and we close the books at midnight tomorrow night. This is not the time to fall short, team. Can you match our average online contribution of $15.11, or whatever you can, today? Here's a link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190730-em2**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190730-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190730_BHQ_20190730-fr-BHQ-EOM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") $15.11 isn't just a number -- it shows that our campaign is powered by the people. We won't take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and fossil fuel or pharma execs. This campaign is funded by grassroots donors, by individual people who believe in Cory's message and chip in. But here's the catch -- the only way we can hit our goal of $34,813 is with the help of supporters like you. Cory qualifying for the fall debates means we're in this for the long haul, and we can't afford to fall behind. [**So will you chip in and match our $15.11 average online contribution before we close the books on our July fundraising numbers?**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190730-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190730_BHQ_20190730-fr-BHQ-EOM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks for your continued support,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190730-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190730_BHQ_20190730-fr-BHQ-EOM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") ** ** ** **

name: BREAKING (via Team Baer)
subject: The stakes just got higher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Colorado is officially a must-win for Democrats to take back the Senate.
|
---

| | **BREAKING: Colorado just named one of the "most important races in the 2020 battle for the Senate!"** CNBC just announced:

Colorado is officially a must-win for Democrats to take back the Senate.

They're the latest to report how high the stakes are in this race. Nate Silver, CNN, MSNBC -- everyone agrees that our ONLY path to ousting Mitch McConnell is through Colorado.

That's why it's all hands on deck before Dan's critical first End of Month Deadline.

The Koch Brothers just jumped into the race, and it'll take a massive surge of grassroots support before the deadline to fight back against their dark money and win.

Can you rush in $19 before our big End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to fight back against the Kochs, oust McConnell, and flip the whole Senate for Democrats?

body:
I told Bill I'd be happy to update you so he can focus on everything he has to prepare.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2116c/1630b3eb/51179870/5f5554b3/975527897/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_julyeom?refcode=694_org_em_fr_seg4")
Friend --
Bill wanted to send you an email today, but I told him I'd be happy to update you so he can stay laser-focused on preparing for tomorrow's debate.
We're now only 1,494 contributions away from our goal -- we've made great progress, but there's only one more day to bring it home.
**[Step up now to help reach Bill's July financial goal before midnight tomorrow. Contribute $1 today.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf2116c/1630b3eb/51179870/5f5554b3/975527897/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_julyeom?refcode=694_org_em_fr_seg4")**
Real progressive accomplishments are possible, and New York City is the proof. The more resources this campaign has, the more support we can build for this campaign. Thank you for stepping up today -- let's get ready to cheer Bill on tomorrow!
In solidarity,
Chirlane

disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Hey there, checking in ahead of our deadline tomorrow at midnight. Last month, the fundraising reports went public and we were able to see how much money Republicans are raising in attempts to take back the House. It's given grassroots Dems across the country a renewed sense of urgency - we have to keep up with them, or we could lose everything. Can you use the link below and rush a donation right away please?

**[https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/dws-july-eom](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-july-eom?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomdwsj&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")**

Thanks,

Debbie

It's given grassroots Dems across the country a renewed sense of urgency - we have to keep up with them, or we could lose everything. Can you use the link below and rush a donation right away please? "" Thanks, Debbie Sent from my iPad | | | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress

name: Patricia Conole via Conole 2019
subject: why I'm proud of Francis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Hi,

It's Pat Conole, Francis' mom!

I'm super proud of the tireless work my son is doing in Central New York, and how he's fought for his country for 20 years. That's why I'm helping to raise money for his campaign while he is away.

[**The team says we need to raise another $6,800 for our Patriot Fund in the next 24 hours in order to stay on-track. Will you contribute before the deadline tomorrow?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+The+team+says+we+need+to+raise+another+6&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ | [$5](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+5&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3") | [$20](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")
---|---|---
[$100](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+100&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3") | [$250](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=250&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+250&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3") | [Other](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+Other&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")
I've seen firsthand how dedicated of a servant Francis is to his country, and I know he'll be just as dedicated serving Central New York.

I know Francis is the best-suited to represent NY-24 in Congress, but his campaign needs the resources to fight the GOP's special interest money and flip the district blue.

[**So, can you please chip in to our Patriot Fund before midnight tomorrow?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+FIRSTNAMESo+can+you+please+chip+in+to+ou&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")

Thank you,

_Pat Conole
Francis' mom_

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1be/388db0e9/81dda4f/609af8fb/2951204467/VEsP/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1be/388db0e9/81dda4f/609af8fa/2951204467/VEsHBQ/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=11+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. But, if you wish to no longer receive emails from us, you can **[unsubscribe here.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1be/388db0e9/81dda4f/609af8f8/2951204467/VEsHBw/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=12+-+unsubscribe+here&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190730_2_3")** Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

Elizabeth is getting ready to take the debate stage tonight -- but you can bet that she's not memorizing a message that's been tested in focus groups or influenced by political calculations.

Instead, she'll do what she always does: speak from the heart. This campaign has always been about fighting for what we believe in: getting organized at the grassroots level to end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, save our democracy, and level the playing field for working people.

subject: unprecedented upset
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked. Speaker Pelosi asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Gabby Giffords asked. Paul Begala asked. Now I'm asking again. **That 's how absolutely critical this end-of-month deadline is to winning my race and flipping the Senate. ** Since I announced, I've watched President Trump and Mitch McConnell make unprecedented moves to steal this seat. Now, more than ever, I need to know my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our movement. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b501/18e32a7f/54173b71/7bcb8e46/482478059/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $15 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b501/18e32a7f/54173b71/7bcb8e46/482478059/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---

To fend off these Republican attacks, I need to come out of this month with an undeniable foundation of support.

Look -- you know I'll have your back every single day in the Senate. Will you have mine with $15 before my end-of-month deadline hits in 24 hours?

| [**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b501/18e32a7f/54173b71/7bcb8e47/482478059/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190730_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b501/18e32a7f/54173b71/7bcb8e7b/482478059/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b501/18e32a7f/54173b71/7bcb8e78/482478059/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b501/18e32a7f/54173b71/7bcb8e79/482478059/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

name: Team Durbin
subject: Senator Durbin needs to know if he can count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
With Dick Durbin in the Senate, we have someone working for families in Illinois and across this nation. Whether it's fighting to lower the costs of health care and prescription drugs, championing the Dream Act and immigration reform, or getting criminal justice reform passed and signed into law, we can always count on Senator Durbin to be in our corner, fighting for us when it counts.
Now, Dick needs to know if he can count on you, Peter. As we approach the end of the month, we need to double down to reach our fundraising goals and keep our campaign on track. We know Dick won't stop fighting for us, but we've got to join him in the fight.
**[We are close to hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal. We only need 200 more grassroots supporters to contribute to Dick Durbin. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: What happened 400 years ago today
body:
The great American Experiment of government by the people was born on July 4, 1776, when the Continental Congress approved... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f13c827403&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 30, 2019
---
| | |
# **What happened 400 years ago today**

**The great American Experiment** of government by the people was born on July 4, 1776, when the Continental Congress approved the Declaration of Independence. But the groundwork for that fateful day was laid 157 years earlier at a small church in Virginia.

**On July 30, 1619** , the first legislative assembly in what would become the United States of America met in Jamestown. Known as “the oldest continuous law-making body in the New World,” the House of Burgesses is now known as the Virginia General Assembly.

**Watch:** [President Trump commemorates 400 years of American democracy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09b16482a6&e=3ee4985eea)

**“On this day** in 1619, just a mile south of where we are gathered now, 22 newly elected members of the House of Burgesses assembled in a small wooden church,” President Trump said today in Williamsburg, Virginia. “They were adventurers and explorers, farmers and planters, soldiers, scholars, and clergymen. All had struggled, all had suffered, and all had sacrificed in pursuit of one wild and very improbable dream.”

**They called** that dream “Virginia,” the President added.

**The Jamestown settlers’** story is well-known to most American schoolchildren, but it’s worth reflecting on just how daunting the challenges that faced these pioneers were. They arrived in America during what we now know was one of the worst droughts in over seven centuries. In their third winter in the New World, known as the “Starving Time,” a population of around 500 settlers was reduced to 60. The rest didn’t make it to spring.

**“Together,****the settlers** forged what would become the timeless traits of the American character,” President Trump said. “They worked hard. They had courage in abundance and a wealth of self-reliance.”

**When the Virginia Colony** formed that first legislative body 400 years ago today, it laid the groundwork for what would become the greatest nation on Earth—with democracy at its core. From city councils and state capitols to the halls of Congress, legislative bodies across America continue to deliberate and represent the will of the people.

**“In our time,** we must vigorously defend those cherished democratic traditions that have made our beloved Republic the envy of the entire world,” President Trump says.

[Read President Trump’s full message on today’s 400th Anniversary.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0cf1957d82&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬**** President Trump:** [Our hard-won culture must be preserved](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f28530583&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: Our 9/11 heroes won’t be left behind**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6dcdf27e26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Yesterday,** President Trump kept America’s promise to all those who answered the call to serve during and following the September 11 terrorist attacks. Surrounded by first responders and the families of victims, the President signed into law a permanent authorization of the 9/11 Victim Compensation Fund.

**“We have an obligation,** and it’s a sacred obligation, to the families and first responders of 9/11,” the President said in the Rose Garden.

**In the wake** of those attacks, more than 2,000 of these brave men and women have died from illnesses related to the toxic fallout from that day. Nearly 18 years later, thousands more fight the same battle.

**Now, these heroes** and their families will always have the financial support they need.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **The Mace of the Virginia House of Delegates is seen as President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks to commemorate the 400 th Anniversary of the First Representative Legislative Assembly at the Jamestown Settlement Museum** | July 30, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25a371ee66&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ee1988148&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d4dcd83fe8)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Before I head onstage:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Tonight, I'll be making the case for our pragmatic, progressive vision to the American people--and I couldn't have gotten this far without you. But before I head out there, I need to ask you once agai | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a45687/2133739261/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

I only have a few minutes, so I'll make this quick: I'm about to walk onstage at the second round of Democratic presidential debates.

Tonight, I'll be making the case for our pragmatic, progressive vision to the American people--and I couldn't have gotten this far without you. But before I head out there, I need to ask you once again for your support.

This debate is a big step in getting our message to the top of voters' minds--but it's only one piece of the puzzle. We need your help to make this campaign a frontrunner.

[**_Can you chip in right now to support me on stage and keep the momentum going?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190730_JH_20190730-fr-JH-goingonstage-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks--gotta run!
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190730_JH_20190730-fr-JH-goingonstage-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a45682/2133739261/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a45683/2133739261/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a45680/2133739261/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a45681/2133739261/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a456be/2133739261/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a456bf/2133739261/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771730/691c9bd/6efae71c/11a45682/2133739261/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: Bennet for America
subject: What we want to say tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Here's the best news we can give Michael when he comes off the debate stage in Detroit tomorrow night:

[_**"You hit it out of the ballpark AND we met our July fundraising goal!"**_](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbacd8/134673f2/ed32575/69966ed2/3663486545/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_073019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Nothing gets Michael more fired up than knowing friends like you stepped up at this crucial moment in our campaign.

And, because Michael is refusing to accept corporate special interest money, your support will send a clear signal to the media, the political pundits, and Democrats across the country that our campaign has the grassroots strength to compete - and win.

[**So, Team, how about it? Can you make your first donation immediately so we can meet our $100,000 goal and share the good news with Michael when he comes off the debate stage tomorrow night? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbacd8/134673f2/ed32575/69966ed2/3663486545/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_073019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
